title: At a Bubble Tea Shop 奶茶店

lines.en: Do you want to get some bubble tea?
Yes! I love bubble tea. What flavors do they have?
lines.zh: 想！我喜欢奶茶。他们有什么口味的？

lines.en: They have milk tea, fruit tea, and matcha tea.
I want a mango fruit tea, please.
What sugar level do you want?
Half sugar, please. Less sugar is healthier.
Do you want boba pearls in it?
I will have a classic milk tea with less ice.
lines.zh: 我要一杯少冰的经典奶茶。

lines.en: Great. Let us pay and wait!
lines.zh: 太好了。我们付钱等一下吧！
